name: context7
description: Live documentation lookup. Use during the architect or implementer stage to pull the current API docs for a library, rather than relying on training data.

tools.name: context7_resolve_library_id
tools.description: Resolve a library name (e.g. 'next.js', 'react') to a context7-compatible ID. Call this first before querying docs.

tools.name: context7_query_docs
tools.description: Fetch live documentation for a library. Returns code snippets and prose from the upstream docs, not the model's training data.
